entries.title: Two-card home screen
goals: Emergency contacts must remain the first primary action.
Social services must remain the second primary action.
Next check-in information should be visible without crowding the primary actions.
entries.prompt:
Review the Abby UI refinement screenshot for: Two-card home screen.
Viewport: desktop.
State: default.
Iteration: 2026-05-03T18-48-47-660Z.
No previous screenshot is available for this iteration.
Prioritize privacy clarity, emergency/safety comprehension, mobile ergonomics, accessibility, text fit, and visual hierarchy.
Return concise findings grouped as: critical issues, UI/UX improvements, accessibility concerns, and suggested implementation changes.
Route-specific goals:
- Emergency contacts must remain the first primary action.
- Social services must remain the second primary action.
- Next check-in information should be visible without crowding the primary actions.
entries.feedback:
DRY RUN: router call skipped.

This target is ready for multimodal review.

Recipient type selection should clearly support people, agencies, and social workers.

entries.title: Emergency recipient access after revocation
goals: Revoked grants should no longer look active.
The revoked state should remain auditable and understandable.
The UI should not imply the recipient still has decrypt or analysis access.
entries.prompt:
Review the Abby UI refinement screenshot for: Emergency recipient access after revocation.
Viewport: desktop.
State: active grant revoked.

Return concise findings grouped as: critical issues, UI/UX improvements, accessibility concerns, and suggested implementation changes.

- Revoked grants should no longer look active.

- The UI should not imply the recipient still has decrypt or analysis access.

Screen: Emergency recipient access after revocation

entries.title: Proof center
goals: Public proof inputs should be easy to inspect.
Precise coordinates, raw documents, and private source data should not appear.
Simulated proof receipts should be clearly distinguishable from verified receipts.
entries.prompt:
Review the Abby UI refinement screenshot for: Proof center.
Viewport: desktop.
State: public proof receipts.
Iteration: 2026-05-03T18-48-47-660Z.
No previous screenshot is available for this iteration.

Return concise findings grouped as: critical issues, UI/UX improvements, accessibility concerns, and suggested implementation changes.
Route-specific goals:
- Public proof inputs should be easy to inspect.
- Precise coordinates, raw documents, and private source data should not appear.
- Simulated proof receipts should be clearly distinguishable from verified receipts.
entries.feedback:
DRY RUN: router call skipped.

This target is ready for multimodal review.

State: public proof receipts

- Simulated proof receipts should be clearly distinguishable from verified receipts.
